questionHtml:
A person lifts a total mass of 20 kg through a vertical distance of 0.60 m. The person repeats the lift n times to transfer a total energy of 6.0 × 104 J.

What is n?


A.  5

B.  50

C.  500

D.  5000

meta.title: A person lifts a total mass of 20 kg through a vertical distance of 0.60 m. The person repeats the lift n times to transfer a total energy of 6.0 × 104 J. What is n? A. 5 B. 50 C.
